introSection: Cosmic Coaster is a kiddie roller coaster currently located at Agorix Temapark in Antalya, Antalya, Turkey. It opened in 2018. For 2023, the coaster was moved to a new outdoor location.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The layout of this coaster is a Mini Coaster model, with the layout being called Mine Vagon.

fullText:
Cosmic Coaster is a kiddie roller coaster currently located at Agorix Temapark in Antalya, Antalya, Turkey. It opened in 2018. For 2023, the coaster was moved to a new outdoor location.

The layout of this coaster is a Mini Coaster model, with the layout being called Mine Vagon.
